goal: Ship DNA Beta 1 with zero drift between routes and roadmap; prioritize security fixes, real-time collaboration, and public identity.
acceptance_criteria: No critical Supabase security or RLS warnings remain
User can create and view posts in realtime on /app/dashboard
User can create a space, add tasks, update status, add milestones
Notifications appear when membership requested or approved
Public profile at /dna/:username renders profile and verified contributions
Test Console can seed, wipe, and run happy path end to end
dependencies: Supabase security advisor warnings resolved before Beta 1 sign-off
Storage RLS uses user-id prefixes for write and public read/signed URLs
Admin check standardized on is_admin_user in SQL and UI

security: No SECURITY DEFINER functions executable by anon/auth unless intended
All SQL functions set search_path = public
RLS policies avoid recursion and use (select auth.uid())
realtime: Feed, spaces, and opportunities update via postgres_changes
quality: All new pages have title and meta description
Mobile layout verified for dashboard, spaces, profile

work_items.title: Resolve RLS initplan warnings
work_items.done_when: All policies use (select auth.uid()); linter clean

work_items.title: Pin search_path for helper functions
work_items.done_when: All SECURITY DEFINER functions set search_path=public

work_items.title: Create Post composer on feed
work_items.done_when: Post appears instantly; New items pill

work_items.title: Harden rpc_create_post
work_items.done_when: Reject HTML, enforce length, rate limit per user

work_items.title: Admin Spotlight toggle
work_items.done_when: Spotlight rises to top; admin-only toggle

work_items.title: Create Opportunity page
work_items.done_when: New item appears in index; realtime updates

work_items.title: Public Impact Profile scaffold
work_items.done_when: Profile loads; shows verified contributions for verified users

work_items.title: Dev Test Console
work_items.done_when: Seed, Happy Path, Wipe, Run cron now, Show badges succeed

sql_changes_proposed.summary: Normalize security definer functions and search_path
actions: Ensure all SECURITY DEFINER functions set search_path to 'public' (and needed schemas)
Verify no public/anon can execute admin-only RPCs

sql_changes_proposed.summary: Standardize RLS policies to use (select auth.uid()) and helper funcs
actions: Replace any recursive policies with security definer helpers
Add missing UPDATE/DELETE policies where needed

sql_changes_proposed.summary: Enable realtime on posts, collaboration_* tables as needed

actions: CREATE VIEW public.public_profiles AS SELECT whitelisted columns WHERE is_public=true;
RLS: Allow SELECT to anon on the view
